title: lotus pedunculatus var. major
intro: Lotus pedunculatus var. major, also known as the greater bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lotus pedunculatus var. major include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and treat skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for use in medicine, with traditional herbal preparations often combining it with other plants to enhance its effects.
